home.badge: Now open – secure savings and easy loans
home.heroSubtitle: Empowering rural communities with accessible loans and secure savings. Your trusted cooperative credit society for all financial needs.

services.title: Personal Loan
services.desc: Quick financial support for your personal needs, medical emergencies, or family events.

services.title: Business Loan
services.desc: Capital to expand your shop, buy inventory, or start a new rural enterprise.

services.title: Gold Loan
services.desc: Instant cash against your gold jewelry with safe storage and low interest rates.

services.title: Fixed Deposit
services.desc: Secure your future with attractive interest rates up to 9% p.a. on your savings.

services.title: Recurring Deposit

home.whyTitle: A Financial Partner You Can Trust
home.whyDesc: Unlike large commercial banks, we understand the unique challenges of rural economies. Our cooperative model ensures that our profits directly benefit our members.

whyPoints.title: A New Beginning with Trusted Service
whyPoints.desc: Committed to providing secure, transparent, and reliable financial services to the community.

whyPoints.title: Local & Personal Service
whyPoints.desc: We know our members by name, not just by account numbers. Experience banking with a human touch.

whyPoints.title: Quick Loan Approval
whyPoints.desc: Minimal paperwork and fast processing times for all loan applications.

whyPoints.title: Competitive Interest Rates
whyPoints.desc: Fair rates on loans and higher returns on your deposits compared to traditional banks.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to secure your financial future?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of happy members and experience the cooperative advantage today.

about.pageDesc: A legacy of trust, transparency, and rural empowerment.
about.intro1: Kalpataru Patsanstha has been established to provide secure, accessible, and transparent financial services to rural Maharashtra.
about.intro2: Built on cooperative principles, the institution operates on mutual support and shared responsibility. Our members are not just customers — they are stakeholders.
about.intro3: Our objective is to offer reliable savings options and simple loan facilities while supporting long-term financial stability in the local community.
about.dedication: 100% dedicated to local community development and financial inclusion.
about.missionDesc: To provide timely, affordable, and transparent financial products to rural citizens, eliminating dependency on informal moneylenders. We strive to cultivate a habit of savings while offering credit that fuels enterprise and personal well-being.
about.visionDesc: To be the most trusted and preferred cooperative financial institution in the region, recognized for our ethical practices, technological adaptation, and unwavering commitment to the socio-economic upliftment of our members.
about.leadershipDesc: Guided by experienced leaders dedicated to cooperative principles.

loans.pageDesc: Affordable credit solutions designed to support your dreams and drive our community's prosperity.
loans.noteDesc: All loan approvals are subject to the society's credit policies and applicant's repayment capacity. Two guarantors who are active members may be required for certain loan types.

items.title: Personal Loan
items.description: Quick financial support for your personal needs, medical emergencies, education, or family events.

items.title: Business Loan
items.description: Capital to expand your shop, buy inventory, or start a new rural enterprise to boost local economy.

items.title: Gold Loan
items.description: Instant cash against your gold jewelry with highly secure storage and immediate disbursal.

deposits.pageDesc: Safe, secure, and rewarding ways to grow your hard-earned money with your trusted cooperative.

items.title: Fixed Deposit
items.description: Grow your lump sum savings securely with our highly attractive interest rates over a fixed tenure.

items.title: Recurring Deposit
items.description: Build a large corpus by depositing small, manageable amounts every month.

items.title: Savings Account
items.description: A standard account to keep your daily funds safe while earning steady interest.
